mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ddd_care c LEFT JOIN ddd_user u ON c.user_number = u.user_number LEFT JOIN ddd_user_shelter s ON c.user_number = s.user_number WHERE c.care_status IN ('open', 'closed')
AND ( s.shelter_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR u.user_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
AND c.care_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum AS rnum, subquery.* FROM ( SELECT c.care_number AS careNumber, c.care_title AS careTitle, c.care_date AS careDate, NVL(s.shelter_name, u.user_nickname) AS shelterName, c.care_write_date AS careWriteDate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ddd_care_apply a WHERE a.care_number = c.care_number) || '/' || c.care_recruit AS applyStatus, c.care_status AS careStatus FROM ddd_care c INNER JOIN ddd_user u ON c.user_number = u.user_number LEFT JOIN ddd_user_shelter s ON c.user_number = s.user_number WHERE c.care_status IN ('open', 'closed')
AND ( s.shelter_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR u.user_nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
AND c.care_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.care_status = 'open' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
CASE WHEN c.care_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, CASE WHEN c.care_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN c.care_date END ASC, CASE WHEN c.care_date < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN c.care_date END DESC,
c.care_number DESC ) subquery ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT c.care_number, c.user_number, c.care_title, c.care_post, c.care_date, c.care_recruit, u.user_nickname, c.care_write_date, c.care_status, COUNT(a.apply_number) AS apply_count FROM ddd_care c JOIN ddd_user u ON c.user_number = u.user_number LEFT JOIN ddd_care_apply a ON c.care_number = a.care_number WHERE c.care_number = #{careNumber} AND c.care_status IN ('open', 'closed') GROUP BY c.care_number, c.user_number, c.care_title, c.care_post, c.care_date, c.care_recruit, u.user_nickname, c.care_write_date, c.care_status
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DDD_CARE ( care_number, user_number, care_title, care_post, care_date, care_recruit, care_write_date, care_status ) VALUES ( seq_care.NEXTVAL, #{userNumber}, #{careTitle}, #{carePost}, #{careDate}, #{careRecruit}, SYSDATE, 'open' )
mapper.update: UPDATE DDD_CARE SET care_status = 'deleted' WHERE care_number = #{careNumber}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ddd_care_apply (apply_number, care_number, user_number, apply_date) SELECT SEQ_CARE_APPLY.NEXTVAL, #{careNumber}, #{userNumber}, SYSDATE FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM DDD_CARE c WHERE c.care_number = #{careNumber} AND c.care_status = 'open' AND TRUNC(c.care_date) >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ddd_care_apply a WHERE a.care_number = c.care_number ) < c.care_recruit )
mapper.update: UPDATE DDD_CARE SET apply_count = apply_count + 1 WHERE care_number = #{careNumber} AND care_status = 'open'
UPDATE ddd_care c SET c.care_status = 'closed' WHERE c.care_number = #{careNumber} AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ddd_care_apply a WHERE a.care_number = c.care_number ) >= c.care_recruit

UPDATE DDD_CARE c SET c.care_status = 'open' WHERE c.care_number = #{careNumber} AND TRUNC(c.care_date) >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ddd_care_apply a WHERE a.care_number = c.care_number) < c.care_recruit AND c.care_status <> 'deleted'
mapper.select: SELECT a.apply_number, u.user_number, u.user_name, u.user_nickname, u.user_phone FROM ddd_care_apply a JOIN ddd_user u ON a.user_number = u.user_number WHERE a.care_number = #{careNumber}

SELECT (COUNT(a.apply_number) || '/' || c.care_recruit) AS apply_status FROM ddd_care c LEFT JOIN ddd_care_apply a ON c.care_number = a.care_number WHERE c.care_number = #{careNumber} GROUP BY c.care_recruit
SELECT user_number FROM DDD_CARE WHERE care_number = #{careNumber} AND care_status <> 'deleted'
mapper.update: UPDATE DDD_CARE c SET c.care_status = CASE WHEN c.care_status = 'deleted' THEN 'deleted' WHEN TRUNC(c.care_date) < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 'closed' WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ddd_care_apply a WHERE a.care_number = c.care_number ) >= c.care_recruit THEN 'closed' ELSE 'open' END WHERE c.care_number = #{careNumber} AND c.care_status <> 'deleted'
UPDATE ddd_care SET care_status = 'closed' WHERE care_status = 'open' AND TRUNC(care_date) < TRUNC(SYSDATE)
